creator: george@m5p.com
text:
After having finished my upgrade from 13.4-RELEASE to 14.2-RELEASE, and recompiling all of my ports, and of course switching from drm-510-kmod to drm-515-kmod, I can no longer reproduce this problem even by rebooting 20 times in a row (my standard stress test for this bug).  So I am closing it now.  I personally believe (based on entirely subjective evidence) that it was the drm-515-kmod upgrade that fixed the problem.

Thanks to everybody to contributed help to this bug, and Happy New Year!
